KPlugin.Description: Renders local Three.js HTML widgets directly on your KDE Plasma 6 desktop. Drop any HTML file into the widgets folder, register it in manifest.json, and select it from the widget config panel. No browser, no Electron. Comes with 9 premade aesthetic Three.js widgets — retrowave, glitch, lo-fi 3D, and more.
KPlugin.Name: ThreeJS Widget Viewer
